title: order by over table from another function
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value NUMERIC(10, 2));
INSERT INTO t1 (name, value) VALUES ('A', 10.50), ('B', NULL), ('C', 20.00);
CREATE TABLE t2 (fieldID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'No Description');
SELECT t1.name, t1.value FROM t1 ORDER BY (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2) DESC;
key_bug_features: order by over table from another function
